recent_excerpts: A proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-39808, a critical command injection vulnerability in Fortinet FortiSandbox, has been released.
Fortinet released patches for 11 vulnerabilities, including two Critical flaws in FortiSandbox and FortiAnalyzer/FortiManager, requiring immediate attention from network administrators.
CISA added six vulnerabilities in Fortinet, Microsoft, and Adobe software to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, warning of active in-the-wild attacks requiring urgent patching.
